rule_metadata.author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: UAC Bypass Using .NET Code Profiler on MMC

rules.rule_text:
title: UAC Bypass Using .NET Code Profiler on MMC
id: 93a19907-d4f9-4deb-9f91-aac4692776a6
status: test
description: Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using .NET Code Profiler and mmc.exe
  DLL hijacking (UACMe 39)
references:
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME
author: Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
date: 2021-08-30
modified: 2022-10-09
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.t1548.002
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|startswith: C:\Users\
    TargetFilename|endswith: \AppData\Local\Temp\pe386.dll
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
